subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my Hope, my ultimate Desire, my Protector and my Helper! I beseech Thee with a heart enkindled with the fire of Thy love and a breast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی و غایه منائی و مغیثی و معینی ادعوک بقلب متاجج بنار محبتک و صدر
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @non-participation in politics, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters
